briefs.title: Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Rules Take Effect January 2027 for BC Businesses Selling Insurance
briefs.summary: BC is bringing in new rules that require certain businesses — like car dealers, funeral providers, and lenders — to hold a restricted insurance agent licence (a limited permit to sell specific types of insurance) before selling products like loan protection or warranty coverage.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business sells any insurance products and prepare to obtain a restricted insurance agent licence by January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Regulation takes effect
